ttl.name: VEHICLE STABILITY CONTROL SYSTEM (for ADVICS Made)

step3.ptxt: Connect the intelligent tester to the DLC3.
Read the DTCs following the prompts on the tester screen.
Connect the intelligent tester to the DLC3.
Operate the intelligent tester to clear the codes.

atten4.ptxt: Refer to the intelligent tester operator's manual for further details.

step3.ptxt: Using SST, connect terminals TC and CG of the DLC3.

Observe the blinking pattern of the ABS and VSC (models without multi information display) warning lights or read the multi information display (models with multi information display) in order to identify the DTC.

atten4.ptxt: If no code appears, inspect the TC and CG terminal circuit, and ABS and VSC warning light circuits.

step3.ptxt: As an example, the illustration below shows the blinking patterns of the normal system code and trouble codes 11 and 21 for ABS and VSC (models without multi information display) warning lights or display of the normal system code and trouble code 43 for the VSC on the multi information display (models with multi information display).
The codes are explained in the code table (See page ).
After completing the check, disconnect terminals TC and CG of the DLC3, and turn off the display.
If 2 or more DTCs are detected at the same time, the DTCs will be displayed in ascending order.
Using SST, connect terminals TC and CG of the DLC3.
Clear the DTCs stored in the ECU by depressing the brake pedal 8 times or more within 5 seconds.
Check that the warning light or multi information display indicates the normal system code.
Remove the SST from the terminals of the DLC3.

atten4.ptxt: Clearing the DTCs cannot be performed by disconnecting the battery terminal or the ECU-IG NO. 2 fuse.

step2.ptxt: Check that the ABS warning light goes off within approximately 3 seconds.
